evidence.correctness_and_freshness: boto3 client with endpoint_url, region_name='auto', generate_presigned_url('put_object', Params={Bucket,Key,ContentType}) is the standard R2 pattern, internally consistent. Endpoint format https://<ACCOUNT_ID>.r2.cloudflarestorage.com matches docs. No deprecated traps.
evidence.executability: server-side upload route references UploadFile in signature before importing it (import inside body comes after use), which will NameError at module load. Also reload=os.getenv(...,True) passes a string 'True' not bool. Otherwise blocks parse; CORS preflight on R2 still needs dashboard config (documented). 1-2 non-obvious fixes needed.
evidence.completeness: All six pieces present: R2 key acquisition with menu path, pip install bash block, .env template, backend main.py, frontend FileUpload.jsx, and curl/pytest test commands. Env var names consistent between .env and code. Minor duplication (server-side upload route) but not blocking.
evidence.citation_anchoring: Multiple official developers.cloudflare.com URLs cited inline near relevant code (e.g., [2] near boto3 client and generate_presigned_url). Third-party sources also present but official dominates.

rubric_notes: docs_unavailable=true; long-tail handling applied — internally consistent with version claims (boto3==1.28.85) → high CF score. UploadFile used before import is the main executability hit.
